headline: US rig count up one as prices climb
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was unchanged this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 242 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 289 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up one from last week at 544 rigs. A year ago, 587 rigs were active. The count shows that 407 rigs sought oil, down three from the previous week, and 129 explored ...
